name: Candy Bar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Sift flour into a measuring cup and level off.
3. In a large bowl, combine all base ingredients until crumbly.
4. Press mixture into an ungreased 15x10-inch jelly roll pan.
5. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until lightly browned.
6. In a small saucepan, melt caramels with 1/4 cup whipping cream and 1/4 cup margarine over low heat, stirring constantly.
7. Remove from heat; stir in 1 cup powdered sugar and chopped pecans (add additional cream if needed for spreading consistency).
8. Spread filling over the base.
9. In another small saucepan, melt chocolate chips with 2 tablespoons whipping cream and 1 tablespoon margarine over low heat, stirring constantly.
10. Remove from heat; stir in 1/4 cup powdered sugar and vanilla extract.
11. Drizzle glaze over the filling.
12. Cut into bars and decorate each with a pecan half.
